element_introduction_order.mastery_context: introduces varied attack patterns and timing
alternative to gunplay for resource conservation
no scrolling escape; focused 1v1 or group combat
melee-only boss encounters (Arm of Mafat, Bodyguard, Canine)

element_introduction_order.first_appears: mixed throughout scrolling and stationary sections

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: navigation with hostile fire from multiple directions
night vision exploration advantage; resource discovery

element_introduction_order.element: Diverse enemy types in mazes (pistol, grenade, machine gun)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: sustained threat management in confined spaces

element_introduction_order.element: Sniper rifle aiming and wind calculation

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: introduces ballistic physics requirement for final encounters

element_introduction_order.first_appears: throughout game via James and Sylvia
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: narrative guidance and resource availability signal

typical_relief_triggers: Safe zones with CIA agent interaction
typical_tension_triggers: Entering timed horizontally scrolling stage with multiple armed enemies
Entering stationary combat room with named boss (Arm of Mafat, Bodyguard, Canine)
3D maze navigation with multi-directional enemy fire
Ferrari action sequence with FSB agent engagement
Final sniper screen with wind calculation pressure
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Alternating intensity: scrolling action bursts against moderate continuous fire, punctuated by high-stakes stationary boss encounters and precision-based sniper and maze sections. Diverse screen types create varied pacing rhythm preventing monotony.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Infrared scope discovery in maze areas suggests hidden/optional exploration paths with equipment rewards
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Weapon pickups and items scattered during scrolling stages provide exploration incentive

difficulty_curve.early_game: Scrolling stages with basic pistol-armed enemies and foundational mechanics (gun, kick, movement)
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalation to machine gun and grenade enemies; introduction of stationary melee-focused boss fights; Ferrari driving segment adds mechanical variety
difficulty_curve.late_game: 3D maze navigation with multi-threat sustained fire management; sniper precision screens requiring wind calculation mastery; cumulative enemy variety (scythes, boomerangs, grenades, machine guns in dense configurations)
notable_spikes: First stationary melee combat encounter (Arm of Mafat in hideout)
3D maze sections with grenade-throwing enemies in confined spaces
Final sniper screen confrontation with wind mechanic demand

notable_level_patterns.description: Horizontally scrolling screens pit player against graduated enemy variety (pistols → machine guns → melee/animals). Encourages gun pickup management and kick-based melee alternatives. Platforming elements (running, jumping) provide spatial navigation challenge.

Timed enclosed spaces forcing melee or close-range combat against named enemies (Arm of Mafat, Bodyguard, Canine). No escape via scrolling; requires direct engagement and timing mastery. High tension, clear relief on victory.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Arm of Mafat encounter in Mafat hideout

notable_level_patterns.description: First-person perspective navigation with sustained enemy fire from multiple directions. Infrared scope discovery provides optional advantage. Combines navigation puzzle elements with active threat management.

Ferrari driving segment removes foot-based movement, introducing gear management and projectile grenades. FSB agents provide high-speed chase intensity. Mechanically distinct from pedestrian gameplay.

Close-up aiming screen with wind physics integration. Tension derives from accuracy requirement and environmental variable (wind speed/direction). Safe introduction context relative to combat sections; high mastery demand.
